com.pdfsolid.conversion.base

Interface ConvertCallback


  • public interface ConvertCallback
    Callback interface for monitoring PDF conversion progress and cancellation. Each conversion task can have its own callback instance.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      default java.lang.String getLayoutResult()
      Getter: Retrieve layout analysis result as a JSON string.
      default java.lang.String getOcrResult()
      Getter: Retrieve OCR result as a JSON string.
      default java.lang.String getTableResult()
      Getter: Retrieve table recognition result as a JSON string.
      boolean isCancelled()
      Called periodically to check if the conversion should be cancelled.
      default boolean onLayout(java.lang.String imagePath)
      Trigger: Request external layout analysis on the image.
      default boolean onOcr(java.lang.String imagePath)
      Trigger: SDK saves page image to temp file, calls this to request external OCR.
      void onProgress(int currentPage, int totalPage)
      Called to report conversion progress.
      default boolean onTable(java.lang.String imagePath)
      Trigger: Request external table recognition on the image.

    • Method Detail

      • onProgress

        void onProgress(int currentPage,
                int totalPage)
        Called to report conversion progress.
        Parameters:
        currentPage - The page number currently being processed (1-based).
        totalPage - The total number of pages in the document.

      • isCancelled

        boolean isCancelled()
        Called periodically to check if the conversion should be cancelled.
        Returns:
        true to request cancellation, false to continue.

      • onOcr

        default boolean onOcr(java.lang.String imagePath)
        Trigger: SDK saves page image to temp file, calls this to request external OCR.
        Parameters:
        imagePath - Path to the temporary image file (PNG format).
        Returns:
        true on success, false on failure.

      • onLayout

        default boolean onLayout(java.lang.String imagePath)
        Trigger: Request external layout analysis on the image.
        Parameters:
        imagePath - Path to the temporary image file (PNG format).
        Returns:
        true on success, false on failure.

      • onTable

        default boolean onTable(java.lang.String imagePath)
        Trigger: Request external table recognition on the image.
        Parameters:
        imagePath - Path to the temporary image file (PNG format).
        Returns:
        true on success, false on failure.

      • getOcrResult

        default java.lang.String getOcrResult()
        Getter: Retrieve OCR result as a JSON string.
        Returns:
        JSON string on success, null on failure.

      • getLayoutResult

        default java.lang.String getLayoutResult()
        Getter: Retrieve layout analysis result as a JSON string.
        Returns:
        JSON string on success, null on failure.

      • getTableResult

        default java.lang.String getTableResult()
        Getter: Retrieve table recognition result as a JSON string.
        Returns:
        JSON string on success, null on failure.
